subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Your brief letter was indeed most detailed - this concision is truly miraculous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده آستان جمال مبارک مکتوب مختصر شما بغایت مفصل بود این ایجاز اعجاز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Shrines and Holy places, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
